title: The Red Lily — Volume 03
summaries: "The Red Lily — Volume 03" by Anatole France is a novel published in 1894. This passionate tale follows Madame Therese Martin-Bellème, a beautiful countess trapped in a loveless marriage, as she navigates complex romantic entanglements with two men. When she leaves her devoted admirer Robert Le Menil for Jacques Dechartre, a sculptor she truly loves, her past threatens to destroy her newfound happiness. Set against the backdrop of Florence and Paris, the story explores jealousy, truth, and the devastating consequences of secrets in love. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
